blocks.text: A song of praise. Of David. א I will extol You, my God and king, and bless Your name forever and ever.
ב Every day will I bless You and praise Your name forever and ever.
ג Great is the Lord and much acclaimed; His greatness cannot be fathomed.
ד One generation shall laud Your works to another and declare Your mighty acts.
ה The glorious majesty of Your splendor and Your wondrous acts will I recite.
ו Men shall talk of the might of Your awesome deeds, and I will recount Your greatness.
ז They shall celebrate Your abundant goodness, and sing joyously of Your beneficence.
ח The Lord is gracious and compassionate, slow to anger and abounding in kindness.
ט The Lord is good to all, and His mercy is upon all His works.
י All Your works shall praise You, O Lord, and Your faithful ones shall bless You.
כ They shall talk of the majesty of Your kingship, and speak of Your might,
ל to make His mighty acts known among men and the majestic glory of His kingship.
מ Your kingship is an eternal kingship; Your dominion is for all generations.
ס The Lord supports all who stumble, and makes all who are bent stand straight.
ע The eyes of all look to You expectantly, and You give them their food when it is due.
פ You give it openhandedly, feeding every creature to its heart’s content.
צ The Lord is beneficent in all His ways and faithful in all His works.
ק The Lord is near to all who call Him, to all who call Him with sincerity.
ר He fulfills the wishes of those who fear Him; He hears their cry and delivers them.
ש The Lord watches over all who love Him, but all the wicked He will destroy.
ת My mouth shall utter the praise of the Lord, and all creatures shall bless His holy name forever and ever.
